ledger_ashby.name: Repair Ledger
ledger_ashby.description: Seven withdrawals against the repair fund, and a tin of numbered receipt stubs that don't quite line up.

satchel_voss.name: Burnt Satchel
satchel_voss.description: Torn, part-burned betting slips, the debts inside them climbing right up to the night of the gala.

manifests_kestrel.name: Shipping Manifests
manifests_kestrel.description: A stack of dock paperwork. Two entries describe a ship arriving before it could possibly have left.

blueprint_marrow.name: Blueprint Tube
blueprint_marrow.description: The original contracted repairs, and a second sheet showing everything that actually got built.

letter_ashgate.name: Torn Correspondence
letter_ashgate.description: A letter torn into six pieces, mixed in with a few things that don't matter at all.

rota_reyes.name: Patrol Rota
rota_reyes.description: A watch schedule, and a half-torn note about a shift swap nobody was told about.

diary_maid.name: Hidden Diary
diary_maid.description: Half plain hand, half a lover's code. Someone was being careful not to name names.
